sagemaker.imageversion.BaseImage.Docs: The container image that the SageMaker image version is based on.
sagemaker.imageversion.BaseImage.Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1\. Maximum length of 255\.

sagemaker.imageversion.ImageName.Docs: The name of the parent image.
sagemaker.imageversion.ImageName.Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1\. Maximum length of 63\.
